sectionHero.description: AnbaChain brings together Black professionals — entrepreneurs, developers, analysts, professors, legal experts, and institutional actors — to accelerate blockchain adoption and build concrete solutions for our community.

sectionMission.label: Our mission
sectionMission.description: AnbaChain creates the missing point of convergence: a space where talents meet, where real community challenges find technological solutions, and where a new generation of blockchain leaders emerges.

network.title: Network
network.desc: Connecting Black blockchain professionals worldwide, by sector and expertise.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.desc: Co-creating blockchain-based responses to real challenges faced by the community across all sectors.

education.title: Education
education.desc: Democratizing blockchain knowledge — from fundamentals to advanced use cases — for all profiles.

impact.title: Impact
impact.desc: Measuring, documenting, and amplifying the economic and institutional influence of the AnbaChain network.

c1.body: Each member is verified and presented with their real expertise. Not an algorithmic feed — a human directory, filterable by sector, city, and availability. The connections formed here are lasting because they are built on a shared foundation.

c2.body: Conferences, hackathons, roundtables, training — every AnbaChain event is designed to produce tangible outcomes: collaborations, projects, hires, partnerships.

c3.body: Sector reports, technical tutorials, governance analyses — all AnbaChain content is written by network members. A living library that grows with every new expertise that joins us.

c4.body: Through the commitment of partners and institutions, each initiative becomes a concrete lever: strategic connections, access to key resources, and opportunities for collaboration, funding, and growth.

sectionAdhesion.label: Membership
sectionAdhesion.description: Choose the plan that fits your profile.

sectionEspace.label: Member space
sectionEspace.desc: A private space to manage your profile, explore the network and access exclusive AnbaChain resources.

profile.title: Complete professional profile
profile.desc: Skills, experience, sector, availability for collaborations

directory.title: Full directory with advanced filters
directory.desc: Search by sector, expertise, city, availability

messaging.title: Direct messaging between members
messaging.desc: Connect directly with professionals in the network

library.title: Exclusive resource library
library.desc: Reports, analyses, guides and webinars for members only

sectionCommunaute.label: Join the movement
sectionCommunaute.desc: Receive analyses, news and invitations in preview. Join professionals building tomorrow's economy.

metadata.title: Terms of Use — AnbaChain
metadata.description: Terms of use for the AnbaChain platform.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property
ip.p1: The content of the ANBACHAIN platform, including but not limited to texts, graphics, images, logos, videos, sounds, software, smart contracts, and all other elements composing the platform, is the exclusive property of ANBACHAIN or its partners, and is protected by Canadian and international intellectual property laws.
ip.p2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, or adaptation of any part of the platform's elements, by any means or process, is prohibited without prior written authorization from ANBACHAIN.

liability.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: ANBACHAIN strives to ensure the accuracy and currency of information published on the platform. However, ANBACHAIN cannot guarantee the accuracy, precision, or completeness of information made available on this platform.
liability.p2: The platform may contain hyperlinks to other websites. ANBACHAIN exercises no control over these sites and disclaims any responsibility for their content.

financial.title: 5. No Financial Advice — Digital Asset Risks
financial.p1: The information and content available on the platform is provided for informational and educational purposes only. It does not constitute investment, financial, legal, or tax advice.
financial.p2: Investing in digital assets carries significant risks, including the risk of total loss of invested capital.

law.title: 6. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
law.p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Province of [To be completed] and the applicable federal laws of Canada.

modifications.title: 7. Modifications
modifications.p1: ANBACHAIN reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.p1: For any questions or complaints, contact us at:

collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
collect.intro: We collect various types of information to provide and improve our services.
collect.provided: name, email, phone number, address, date of birth, profile and professional info.
collect.content: messages, posts, comments and shared materials.
collect.auto: IP address, browser, OS, pages visited and interactions.

sharing.title: 3. Sharing of Information
sharing.p1: We do not sell personal data.
sharing.p4: We may disclose if required by law.

blockchain.title: 4. Blockchain Data Transparency
blockchain.p1: Blockchain data is public and immutable.

transfer.title: 5. International Transfers
transfer.p1: Data may be processed outside Canada.

security.title: 6. Data Security
security.p1: We protect data with security measures.

retention.title: 8. Data Retention
retention.p1: Data is kept as long as necessary.

links.title: 9. Third-Party Links
links.p1: We are not responsible for external sites.

intro.title: 1. What is a Cookie?
intro.p1: A cookie is a small text file stored on your device.
intro.p2: Cookies remember preferences such as language and login.

choices.title: 5. Your Choices
choices.p1: You can accept or refuse cookies.
choices.p2: Some features may not work without cookies.

fadjiah.label: Founders
fadjiah.name: Fadjiah Collin‑Mazile
fadjiah.role: Data leader, angel investor & blockchain strategist at the intersection of emerging technologies and global economic equity

bio.p1: As Head of Data at CoinList, she has built and leads the data science, data engineering and analytics functions at one of the most recognized crypto token sale platforms in the world.
bio.p2: A certified corporate director, she sits on several boards and advisory committees covering technology, data and inclusion, including RepMatters, which supports innovation led by Black people.
bio.p3: A member of the Transatlantic Angel Investing Group and a recurring judge for startup innovation grants and funds, Fadjiah brings deep expertise in evaluating early-stage projects.
bio.p4: She is also passionate about bridging the Canadian and African technology ecosystems through trade missions to Ghana, South Africa, Kenya and Ethiopia, and by investing in founders in these markets.
bio.p5: Her Substack, "The Allegory of the Block", explores blockchain from a geopolitical angle, following builders rather than prices, and examining how emerging economies can become producers rather than consumers of decentralized infrastructure.
bio.p6: A recognized speaker, she makes complex systems readable and encourages audiences to see blockchain not as speculation, but as sovereignty.

brice.label: Founders
brice.name: Brice Mimifir
brice.role: Java Developer, Digital Transformation Consultant & Blockchain Developer at the intersection of robust technology and decentralized innovation

bio.p1: Brice is the founder of Theanhk, a blockchain development company based in Montreal with a strong international focus.
bio.p2: He designs and develops high-performance backend solutions in Java while actively contributing to blockchain integration initiatives.
bio.p3: Certified in Solidity Smart Contract Development, Blockchain Basics, and Advanced Web3 Wallet Security, Brice leverages his technical expertise to deliver reliable and secure solutions.
bio.p4: Previously, he worked as a Java developer at the National Bank of Canada, contributing to digital banking systems and key modernization projects.
bio.p5: Passionate about the practical application of blockchain beyond speculation, Brice is committed to building robust, secure, and results-driven systems that deliver real operational efficiency and technological sovereignty to organizations.

brand.description: The blockchain network for Black professionals — networking, innovation and solutions for the community.
